title: Module 1
content:
Basics of fluid power system, Components, Advantages and applications of
Fluid power systems Fluid properties: specific weight, density and specific
gravity, Pascal’s Law and its application   Continuity equation, Conservation
Of Energy, Frictional losses in hydraulic pipelines - laminar and turbulent
flow, Fluid power symbols.

title: Module 2
content:
Hydraulic pumps: Gear, Vane and Piston pumps, Pump performance,
Characteristics and Selection - Sizing of  pumps
Hydraulic Motors- Limited Rotation Hydraulic Motors, Gear Motors, Vane
Motors, Piston Motors, Hydraulic Motor Theoretical Torque, Power, And
Flow Rate, Hydraulic Motor Performance

title: Module 3
content:
Hydraulic Valves- Direction control valves: Three way valve, Four way
valves, Check valve and shuttle valve Actuation mechanisms in DCV
Pressure control valves: Pressure relief, Pressure Reducing, Counter balance,
Sequencing and Unloading Valves Flow control valves and its types
Proportional Valves Servo valves: Mechanical type and Electrohydraulic
servo valves.

title: Module 4
content:
Pneumatics: Air compressors, air treatment: Air filters, Dryer, Lubricator,
pressure regulation, Compressor types, Pneumatics and Hydraulics,
Properties Of Air, The Perfect Gas Laws, Fluid Conditioners, Air Control
Valves, Pneumatic Actuators, Fluid Logic Control Systems - Introduction To
Boolean Algebra, Laws Of Boolean Algebra, Illustrative Examples Using
Boolean Algebra
